meaning: n.(尤指不寻常的人或事)出现,到来 (Advent)n. 基督降临 2降临节
examples: The advent of the computer has brought this sort of task within the bounds of possibility.
Since the advent of television people have been prophesying the death of the book.
The advent of new technologies has added about 4.2 million barrels per day to the crude oil market.
Many eras also proclaimed storytelling's demise: the advent of the printing press, radio, television, the Internet.
And most important, the Indian low-cost carrier arrived in 2003 with the advent of Air Deccan.
